property.name: dfs.namenode.name.dir
property.description: Determines where on the local filesystem the DFS namenode should store the fsimage file.

property.name: dfs.datanode.data.dir
property.description: Determines where datanode should store its blocks.

property.name: dfs.namenode.http-address
property.description: The address and the base port where the dfs namenode web ui will listen on.

property.name: dfs.namenode.datanode.registration.ip-hostname-check
property.description: Allow DataNodes advertising localhost for host-side WebHDFS access.
